Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

James Campbell Bridgman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DEBORAH SMITH.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) JOHNY K. WANG.

Plaintiff Deborah Smith sworn and examined on her own behalf.

Damages: $81,754.92

Total Judgment in the amount of $84,609.92
Judgment signed in open court.
